cases.name: BED-8320 long-form typed undirected predicate remains row-correlated from left-bound node
BED-8320 long-form typed undirected predicate remains row-correlated from right-bound node
BED-8320 long-form negated typed undirected predicate excludes NodeKind1 incident nodes from left-bound node
BED-8320 long-form negated typed undirected predicate excludes NodeKind1 incident nodes from right-bound node
BED-8320 long-form typed both-bound undirected predicate finds connected pair
cases.cypher: match (a:NodeKind1), (b:NodeKind2) where a.name = 'User A' and b.name = 'KEY ADMINS BETA' and (a:NodeKind1)-[:EdgeKind1]-(b:NodeKind2) return count(a)

cases.name: BED-8320 long-form typed both-bound undirected predicate rejects wrong edge kind
cases.cypher: match (a:NodeKind1), (b:NodeKind2) where a.name = 'User A' and b.name = 'KEY ADMINS ALPHA' and (a:NodeKind1)-[:EdgeKind1]-(b:NodeKind2) return count(a)
